package middleware

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_allocates_regex_or_template_per_request: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Regexp compilation inside Gin handlers instead of using precompiled patterns.
type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestModel
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "middleware_allocates_regex_or_template"
    _ = focus
    os.ReadFile(input)
    middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive := map[string]int{"middleware": 1, "allocates": 2, "regex": 3, "template": 4, "per": 5, "request": 6}
    middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    middleware_positive_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = middleware_positive_0
    allocates_positive_1 := middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive["allocates"] + len(input)
    _ = allocates_positive_1
    regex_positive_2 := middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive["regex"] + len(input)
    _ = regex_positive_2
    template_positive_3 := middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive["template"] + len(input)
    _ = template_positive_3
    for per_positive_4Index, item := range items { middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_4Index }
    request_positive_5 := middleware_allocates_regex_template_per_positive["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_positive_5
    return nil
}
